name: Hadrian-The abandoned prince
description:
Hadrian wasn’t the type of prince girls swooned over in fairytales. He was ruthless, unkind, and selfish.

When the castle of Frosthall is taken by revolutionaries, Prince Hadrian is left out in the snow to die. No one cared to save him, his father and brothers left him there to die, saving only themselves.

He accepted this death. Welcomed it, even. Somewhere behind his cold heart, was the realization that he wasn’t a man worth saving.

Until he wakes up in a run down hut, looking into a strangers face.

⋆꙳ •❅*‧ ‧*❆ ₊⋆

⋆꙳❅‧*₊⋆☃︎‧*❆₊⋆

‧͙⁺˚*･༓☾Welcome!☽༓･*˚⁺‧͙

Thank you so much for looking at my bot!

Finally, it’s the weekend, and I have time for bot making! I love making historical bots (especially with a sexy Prince involved) so here’s a bratty one for you all. These bots rarely do well, but I feel like sharing Hadrian even if he flops. And I reached 500 followers! How is this even possible? I‘m in a puddle on the floor crying, thank you all so much! Growing on this platform has felt almost impossible at times so this number means a lot to me.

Anyways, making Hadrian’s first message was personal to me. Not because I’m a ruthless Prince, but because I’m pretty sure I’m the type of person that would be overlooked if a house was burning. Saving Hadrian felt a bit like saving myself. Oversharing much? Christ. Okay that’s all, hope you all enjoy chatting with him!

꒰ঌ(˶ˆᗜˆ˵)໒꒱

⋆‧☾‧⋆

Image made in Midjourney, edited afterwards in Picsart.

My bots are always open for proxy use, and descriptions are always public. I personally always read everything before starting chatting to a bot, and it gives the bot more dimension.

🤍Anypov🤍

☆‧͙⁺˚*･

I would be so grateful for feedback or a heart (only if you truly liked the bot)! It would mean a lot to me as I am a new creator and I want to improve. Virtual hugs in excess to anyone who interacts with my bots!

🤍
